steps.assistant_text: Counter dec/inc dispatcher, former 'true coloring cap permuter-floored'. THE CACHED LOCAL WAS THE CAP: any cached-local spelling of s0->0x2C makes the (v-4)/(v+4) temp a uopt CANDIDATE (constrained pool -> $v1); target has it in the ugen FIFO ring (t8). Fix: eliminate the local — direct field RMW s0[0x2C/4] -= 4; clamp via if(s0[0x2C/4] < 0) (CSEs with stored value); join test re-reads the field. uopt then builds the v0 phi itself (move edge copies, addiu renamed into beqz delay) and dec/inc temps stay ugen FIFO. +volatile int vpad in the removed local's decl slot keeps buf offsets (frame unchanged). uoptlist-diagnosed (cand->R2/$v1 vs const->R24/$t8).

metadata.verification: 106/106 reloc-aware word-exact (27 relocs correct) + make ROM byte-identical
